column1: In JavaServer Faces, what technology typically represents the presentation layer for web applications?
Which JSF tag library defines tags representing common HTML user interface components?
Which JSF tag library defines tags for core actions that are independent of a specific render kit?
What XML namespace prefix is conventionally used for the JSF HTML tag library?
What XML namespace prefix is conventionally used for the JSF core tag library?
In Facelets, which attribute uniquely identifies a component for reference by other components or server-side classes?
Unlike most JSF attributes, the `id` attribute must use the evaluation syntax delimited by _____.
Which attribute determines whether a component is actually rendered on the page based on a Boolean expression?
What restriction applies to the EL expressions used with the `rendered` attribute?
Which attribute binds a component instance to a specific bean property?
Which attribute identifies a bean property and binds the component's data value to it?
Setting the `immediate` attribute to true on an input component forces validation and conversion to occur during the _____ phase.
Which JSF HTML tag represents the standard HTML `<form>` element?
What happens to data from multiple `h:form` tags on a single page during a postback?
column2: Only values from the form actually submitted by the user are included.

column1: Which JSF tag represents the head element of an HTML page and supports resource relocation?
Which JSF tag represents the body element of an HTML page?
Which tag renders an HTML password input field, masking the characters entered?
Setting the `redisplay` attribute to false in `h:inputSecret` prevents the password from appearing in the _____.
Which tag renders a standard editable HTML text field?
Which tag displays read-only text as a single-line string?
Which tag renders a multiline text area for user input?
The `label` attribute on an input tag provides a name used to identify the component in _____.
What Boolean attribute indicates that a user must provide a value for a specific input component?
Which JSF tag is used to attach a label to an input field to improve accessibility?
In an `h:outputLabel` tag, which attribute must match the `id` of the associated input component?
Which tag creates a link that loads a new page without generating an action event?
Which tag displays concatenated messages using a `java.text.MessageFormat` pattern?
Which core tag provides substitution parameters for an `h:outputFormat` component?
Which tag renders a button used to submit forms to the application?
Which tag renders an HTML link that generates an action event when clicked?
What is the primary difference between `h:commandLink` and `h:outputLink`?
column2: h:commandLink generates an action event and uses POST, while h:outputLink uses GET without an action event.

column1: In an `h:commandButton`, the `action` attribute can point to a bean method that returns a _____.
Which tag is used to render an image on a JSF page?
Which attribute of `h:graphicImage` specifies the path to an image relative to the web application context?
Which tag renders a set of components as an HTML table layout?
What attribute of `h:panelGrid` determines how many components are placed in a single row?
Which tag is used to group multiple components so they appear as a single child to a parent layout component?
If the `layout` attribute of `h:panelGroup` is set to `block`, what HTML element is rendered?
If the `layout` attribute of `h:panelGroup` is not set to `block`, what HTML element is rendered by default?
Which tag represents a single Boolean choice, typically rendered as a checkbox?
Which tag renders a set of checkboxes allowing the selection of multiple values?
Which tag renders a drop-down menu for selecting exactly one value?
Which tag represents a set of radio buttons for selecting one value?
Which tag represents a single item within a selection component like a menu or listbox?
Which tag is used to bind a selection component to a collection or map of items in a managed bean?
Which JSF component tag is designed specifically to display relational data in a dynamic HTML table?
Which tag represents a column within an `h:dataTable` component?
In `h:dataTable`, what attribute specifies the name of the request-scoped variable used to iterate over the data?
Which core tag is used to define headers, footers, or captions for columns and tables?
How many child components can an `f:facet` tag contain?
column2: Exactly one (though it can be a container like `h:panelGroup`).

column1: Which `h:dataTable` attribute defines the index of the first row to be displayed?
Which `h:dataTable` attribute defines the number of rows to display starting from the `first` index?
Which tag displays error messages associated with a specific component identified by its `id`?
Which tag displays all validation and conversion error messages for the entire page?
In `h:message`, what attribute specifies the target component's ID?
Which JSF tags are used to create bookmarkable URLs that utilize GET requests?
Setting the `includeViewParams` attribute to true in an `h:link` tag adds _____ to the generated hyperlink.
Which core tag is used inside `f:metadata` to define a parameter for configuring bookmarkable URLs?
Where must the `f:viewParam` tag be declared on a page to properly configure parameters?
Which tag is used to relocate a JavaScript resource to a specific target location like the head or body?
Which tag is used to include a CSS style sheet in a JSF page?
In `h:outputScript`, what attribute defines where the resource is rendered (e.g., 'head' or 'body')?
Which core tag registers a specialized action listener to push a value into a bean when a form is submitted?
Which core tag adds a `DateTimeConverter` to a parent component?
Which core tag adds a `NumberConverter` to a parent component?
Which validator tag ensures a numeric value falls within a specified range of double-precision values?
Which validator tag checks the length of a component's local value against minimum and maximum limits?
Which core tag delegates validation of a value to a Bean Validation provider?
Which core tag allows the association of an Ajax action with a single component or group?
Which core tag is used to specify a `ResourceBundle` that is exposed as a Map for localization?
In `h:panelGrid`, what attribute allows you to specify CSS classes for the table's columns?
In `h:panelGrid`, what attribute allows you to specify CSS classes for the table's rows?
Which JSF tag attribute is used to reference a CSS class for styling a component?
Which JSF tag attribute is used to define inline CSS styles for a component?
Which core tag is used to install a `ComponentSystemEventListener` on a component?
